title: Star Wars: Jedi Council: Acts of War
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{ComicSeries |image=[[File:JCAOWTPB-FC.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Jedi Council: Acts of War'' |writer=[[Randy Stradley]] |penciller=[[Davidé Fabbri]] |inker=[[Christian Dalla Vecchia]] |letterer=[[Steve Dutro]] |colorist=[[David McCaig|Dave McCaig]] |cover artist=[[David Michael Beck]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |start date=[[June 21]], [[2000]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54290/star_wars_jedi_council_-_acts_of_war_2000_1|text=Star Wars: Jedi Council - Acts of War (2000) #1}} |end date=[[September 20]], [[2000]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54293/star_wars_jedi_council_-_acts_of_war_2000_4|text=Star Wars: Jedi Council - Acts of War (2000) #4}} |schedule=Monthly |format=Completed |issues=4 |timeline=[[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Rise of the Sith]]''''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]''''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars: Jedi Council: Acts of War''''' was a 4-part series of comics published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] from June 21, [[2000]] to September 20, 2000. The four issues were collected into one [[Star Wars: Jedi Council: Acts of War (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: Jedi Council: Acts of War'' trade paperback]] in June 2001. The story was retold from the perspective of [[Vilmarh Grahrk]] in ''[[Star Wars: The Devaronian Version]]''. ==Publisher's summary== ''In the days of the Old Republic, before the threat of the Phantom Menace, the Jedi Council guides the Jedi Knights as defenders of peace and justice throughout the galaxy. When a brutal conflict arises, two Jedi are dispatched by council member Mace Windu and presented with a new challenge: the treacherous Yinchorri. When only the Jedi's mutilated bodies return from the mission, Mace realizes how greatly he has underestimated this new foe: the volatile Yinchorri are immune to Jedi mind control. As this grave mistake weighs heavily on Mace, the challenge now lies before the Council: How can they battle a violent enemy that has no fear of Jedi Knights, as it gathers weapons that threaten the stability of the Republic?'' ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: Jedi Council: Acts of War}} ===Issues=== {| {{Prettytable}} ! colspan="3" |Color code key: |- |style="background-color:#FFBB60;" width="24%" align="center"|Collected (TPB) issue |style="background-color:#40CC40;" width="24%" align="center"|Released issue |style="background-color:#FFFF80;" width="24%" align="center"|Future issue |} {| {{Prettytable}} !
